nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel, ‘When a man or woman commits any of the sins of mankind, acting unfaithfully against the Lord, and that person is guilty,

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel, When a man or woman commits any of the sins that people commit by breaking faith with the Lord, and that person realizes his guilt,

cnv.text: “你要對以色列人說：無論男女，如果犯了人所犯的任何罪，以致得罪耶和華，那人就有了罪；

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “无论男女，若损害别人就是不忠于耶和华，就是犯罪。
